---
applyTo: "**/*.razor,**/*.razor.cs"
---

## UI instructions

- Keep Razor components focused on presentation and interaction orchestration.
- Move non-trivial logic into injected services or backing classes.
- Ensure forms validate clearly and show actionable validation messages.
- Prefer accessible labels, semantic structure, and keyboard-friendly controls.
- Task views should support filtering by type, status, date range, and assignee or deliverable target when available.
